title: Present Simple: When to Use
definition:
Habits & Routines: Actions that happen with some frequency.\br
Stative Verbs: Senses, sensations and feelings.\br 
General Truth: Things that are always true.
example1:
I wake up at 7 AM every day.\br
I think you need to rest.\br
Water boils at 100°C.

title: Present Simple: Formula
example1:
I like coffe.\br
She eats fish.
example2:
I like coffe.\br
She eats fish.

title: Present Simple Quiz
question_text: She ______ to school every day.

title: WH- Question: What
tip: Use What to ask about asking for information about things

title: WH- Question: Who
tip: Use Who to ask about asking about people

title: WH- Question: Where
tip: Use Where to ask about asking about places

title: WH- Question: When
tip: Use When to ask about asking about time

title: WH- Question: Why
tip: Use Why to ask about asking for reasons

title: WH- Question: Which
tip: Use Which to ask about asking for choice from limited options

title: WH- Question: Whose
tip: Use Whose to ask about asking about possession

title: WH- Question: How
tip: Use How to ask about asking about manner, condition, quantity

title: WH- Question: How many
tip: Use How many to ask about asking about countable quantities

title: WH- Question: How much
tip: Use How much to ask about asking about uncountable quantities or price

title: WH- Question: How often
tip: Use How often to ask about asking about frequency

title: WH- Question: How long
tip: Use How long to ask about asking about duration

title: WH- Question: How far
tip: Use How far to ask about asking about distance

title: WH- Question: How old
tip: Use How old to ask about asking about age

title: WH- Question: How come
tip: Use How come to ask about informal why

definition: past regret about a bad action
